title: Patent strategy for growth-stage enterprises
excerpt: How founders can align IP filings with fundraising milestones and international expansion.
content: Growth-stage companies often delay patent filings, assuming product-market fit is the only milestone that matters. A stronger approach is to align patent timelines with capital raises, strategic partnerships, and licensing discussions.
Prioritize filings that protect core algorithms, proprietary workflows, and defensible differentiation. Pair them with a commercialization roadmap to convert IP into revenue.
Work with counsel early to avoid disclosure risks during demos, fundraising decks, and pilot programs.

title: A debt recovery roadmap for B2B transactions
excerpt: Early documentation, negotiation cues, and litigation triggers that preserve commercial relationships.
content: Debt recovery works best when escalation steps are defined before the contract is signed. Payment schedules, interest clauses, and dispute-resolution pathways should be explicit.
For corporate clients, structured reminders and negotiated settlements often preserve vendor relationships while keeping cash flow stable.
When litigation is required, ensure documentation is organized chronologically to speed up pleadings and hearings.

title: Electronic evidence: a practical courtroom checklist
excerpt: Key steps to make digital records admissible, reliable, and ready for dispute resolution.
content: Collect electronic evidence with a documented chain of custody, including metadata and access logs.
Preserve original files before transformation to avoid authenticity challenges.
Maintain expert declarations and technical notes to support admissibility when required.
